title: Broken Projector in Room 302
description: The projector in room 302 of the MVJ block has a distorted blue tint and flickering bulb. Please check this.

title: Need more Core Engineering reference books in Library
description: We need additional physical copies of core textbooks for Mechanical, ECE, and CSE departments. Current copies are always checked out or unavailable during exam seasons.

title: Improve hostel mess food hygiene
description: The plates are often damp, and fly screens are missing near the serving area. Student health is at risk. Please schedule a food quality and hygiene audit.
